d: Satrana does the fiery dance, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage to surrounding enemies within [[2]] tiles. She is [[invincible]] during the effect.
The last strike of this skill [[charms]] enemies for [[2]]s, making them only use normal attacks while charmed.
Increases damage to [[260%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[280%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.

Satrana scratches enemies in a 1-tile arc twice. Each strike deals [[110%]]<ATK> damage plus [[2.5%]] target's max HP. The additional damage cannot exceed [[75%]] of Satrana's ATK. The damage dealt by this skill grants Satrana [[100]] Life Drain.
Increases damage to [[115%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[130%]]<ATK>.

Satrana grants Sparks to allies within 2 tiles when a battle starts. When Satrana or allies with Sparks deal damage to an enemy for [[3]] times, the target is ignited, taking damage equal to [[0.8%]] of max HP every [[1]]s and reducing their Vitality by [[20]]. The skill damage cannot exceed [[45%]] of Satrana's ATK. The effect lasts until the battle ends.
When all enemies or a total of [[5]] enemies have been ignited, the Vitality reduction is increased to [[60]].
Increases damage to [[1%]] of the target's max HP.
When all enemy heroes or [[5]] enemy heroes have been ignited, the damage is increased to [[2%]] of max HP.
Reduces damage taken by [[12%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[16%]] during battle.
Reduces damage taken by [[20%]] during battle.
When an enemy hero is ignited, the magic damage taken by Satrana is reduced by [[16%]] until the battle ends. Satrana grants this effect to a nearby ally when one more enemy hero is ignited.
Each ignited enemy hero grants Satrana [[200]] Energy.
Increases Satrana's magic DMG Reduction to [[20%]].
Increases Satrana's magic DMG Reduction to [[22%]].
Vixen Rush's cooldown is removed when all enemy heroes are ignited or when a total of [[5]] enemy heroes have been ignited.
Increases ignite damage by [[100%]]. The effects that previously required igniting [[5]] heroes now trigger after igniting [[4]] heroes.
